defaultItem.headline: FOREST VORST RUGBY
defaultItem.tagline: One club, one family. Rooted in Forest-Vorst, forged on the pitch. Where passion meets the scrum.

fields.name: logoImage
fields.label: Main Logo Image
fields.description: The primary logo or emblem displayed in the hero section. Recommended size: 360x360px.

defaultItem.headline: About the Club
defaultItem.tagline: Founded in 2007, the Forest-Vorst Rugby Club was born from a simple idea: bring together the diverse, multicultural community of Forest and Vorst around the love of rugby.

valuesList.title: Competitive Spirit
valuesList.paragraph: We play to win, every single match.

valuesList.title: Brotherhood
valuesList.paragraph: Rugby forges bonds that last a lifetime.

valuesList.title: Inclusivity
valuesList.paragraph: Open to all, regardless of origin or level.

valuesList.title: Passion for Rugby
valuesList.paragraph: The sport is in our DNA since day one.

defaultItem.title: Contact & Join Us
defaultItem.mainParagraph: Whether you're a seasoned rugby player or have never touched a ball — we welcome everyone.
